title: dactyloctenium australe
intro: Dactyloctenium australe, also known as black jack grass, is a perennial grass species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Dactyloctenium australe include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots or leaves in water to treat various ailments.
